SHAFT_Engine, 10.2.20260615

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    HealingCandidate
    Explainable candidate derived from deterministic page evidence.
    HealingConfiguration
    Immutable current-thread SHAFT Heal configuration snapshot.
    HealingDecision
    Final safe recovery decision.
    HealingDecision.Status
    Decision status.
    HealingReport
    Structured, explainable SHAFT Heal attempt report.
    HealingReport.ActionMetadata
    Action metadata.
    HealingReport.PrivacyMetadata
    Privacy metadata.
    HealingReport.ProviderMetadata
    Optional provider metadata.
    HealingScore
    Separate deterministic, visual, provider, and final ranking scores.
    HistoryDocument
    Versioned local history document.
    HistoryRecord
    Checksummed bounded local history record.
    LocatorFingerprint
    Privacy-minimized semantic and DOM fingerprint for a verified web element.
    ShaftHeal
    Runtime access to the most recent SHAFT Heal report on the current thread.
    ShaftHealingProvider
    Default deterministic SHAFT Heal provider.
